reasoning: The NIST 800-53 CA-7-c control focuses on continuous monitoring and ongoing control assessments. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture changes, such as network policies and admission controller configurations. Monitoring changes to network configurations can be achieved through audit logs and ensuring that NetworkPolicies are actively monitored. Admission controllers can be used to enforce policies and log changes to configurations.
